item.title: NORD adds 112 frame size to IE5+ synchronous motor line
item.description: NORD offers IE5+ motors in sizes 71, 90, and newly released, size 112, extending the power range from 0.5 to 15.0 hp. The post NORD adds 112 frame siz...

item.title: Intuitive buys European surgical robot distributors
item.description: Intuitive said more than 470 da Vinci surgical robots were installed in Italy, Spain and Portugal as of Dec. 31, 2025. The post Intuitive buys Europea...

item.title: 6 lessons I learned watching a robotics startup die from the inside
item.description: After a year as COO of K-Scale Labs, Rui Xu reflects on the hard lessons behind the collapse of its low-cost humanoid robot ambitions — from overrelia...

item.title: BMW piloting Hexagon’s wheeled humanoid in Germany
item.description: BMW launched an initial test deployment of Hexagon's AEON humanoid at its Group Plant Leipzig in December 2025 The post BMW piloting Hexagon’s wheeled...

item.title: 2026 Robotics Summit early bird registration ends today
